---
title: "Complexity Lab"
---

A research lab studying **India's passenger-vehicle market as a complex system**:
VAHAN registration data (2012–2026, state × month × OEM × fuel) joined with
state covariates — per-capita income, urbanization, CNG/EV infrastructure,
fuel prices, road tax, policy events.

Every page under **Experiments** is a reproducible Quarto notebook committed to
[the repo](https://github.com/kapil433/complexity-lab); the site re-renders on push.

## Analytical ladder

1. **Descriptive** — size, growth, fuel mix, seasonality, concentration
2. **Distributions** — heavy tails, rank–size, inequality
3. **Econometrics** — panel regressions, Granger, changepoints
4. **Networks** — OEM–state bipartite structure and its evolution
5. **Complexity** — entropy/diversity, early-warning signals
6. **Simulation** — Bass diffusion, agent-based adoption

## Reproduce locally

```bash
uv sync --all-extras
uv run lab ingest && uv run lab panel
uv run lab app        # interactive lab
quarto preview        # this site
```

*Data: Vahan Intelligence (vahanintelligence.in), based on VAHAN/Parivahan
public data (MoRTH, GoI). Reference series carry per-file provenance and
quality flags — see the data dictionary in the repo.*
